assertions.title: MCP rewrite_plan tool returns valid plan

steps.action: Run existing MCP unit tests
steps.observed: 16/16 passed

steps.action: Create sample.py with 3 Python functions using return statements
steps.observed: File created at artifacts/val-hw-mcp/sample.py

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_plan with pattern='def $F($$$ARGS): return $EXPR', replacement='lambda $$$ARGS: $EXPR', lang='python'
steps.expected: JSON with version, routing_backend, routing_reason, total_edits, edits[]
steps.observed: JSON returned with all required fields: version=1, routing_backend=AstBackend, routing_reason=ast-native, total_edits=3, edits[3]

steps.action: Copy sample.py to sample_apply.py for isolated apply test
steps.observed: Copy created

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_apply with pattern/replacement/lang/path and verify=true
steps.expected: JSON with plan and verification sub-objects including routing metadata
steps.observed: JSON returned with plan (contains edits), verification (verified=3, mismatches=[]), routing_backend=AstBackend, routing_reason=ast-native

steps.action: Verify file content changed
steps.observed: File content changed - functions replaced with lambdas

evidence.network: N/A - direct function invocation via subprocess to tg.exe

assertions.title: MCP rewrite_diff tool returns unified diff

steps.action: Record file mtime before invoking diff
steps.observed: Mtime recorded

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_diff with pattern/replacement/lang/path
steps.expected: JSON with diff field containing unified diff format
steps.observed: JSON returned with diff field containing --- a/, +++ b/, @@ markers

steps.action: Verify file mtime unchanged after diff
steps.observed: File mtime identical before and after

evidence.network: N/A - direct function invocation via subprocess to tg.exe

assertions.title: MCP index_search tool returns results via index

steps.action: Invoke tg_index_search with pattern='ERROR' on bench_data directory
steps.observed: JSON returned: version=1, routing_backend=TrigramIndex, routing_reason=index-accelerated, total_matches=0

evidence.network: N/A - direct function invocation via subprocess to tg.exe

assertions.title: All MCP tools include routing metadata

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_plan and check for routing_backend/routing_reason
steps.observed: routing_backend=AstBackend, routing_reason=ast-native

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_diff and check for routing_backend/routing_reason
steps.observed: routing_backend=AstBackend, routing_reason=ast-native

steps.action: Invoke tg_index_search and check for routing_backend/routing_reason
steps.observed: routing_backend=TrigramIndex, routing_reason=index-accelerated

steps.action: Invoke tg_search (mocked) and check for routing info in text output
steps.observed: Routing: backend=CpuBackend reason=text-search present in output

steps.action: Invoke tg_ast_search (mocked) and check for routing info in text output
steps.observed: Routing: backend=AstGrepWrapperBackend reason=ast-search present in output

steps.action: Invoke tg_devices and check JSON output
steps.observed: Valid JSON with device inventory schema (platform, devices)

steps.action: Run all 16 existing MCP unit tests
steps.observed: 16/16 passed

steps.action: Invoke tg_search with mocked backend
steps.expected: Returns match results with routing info
steps.observed: Found 1 matches across 1 files with routing summary

steps.action: Invoke tg_ast_search with mocked backend
steps.expected: Returns AST match results with routing info
steps.observed: Found 1 structural AST matches with routing summary

steps.action: Invoke tg_classify_logs
steps.expected: Function callable (CyBERT may not be available)
steps.observed: Function invoked, CyBERT unavailable (no GPU/connection) but function didn't crash

steps.action: Invoke tg_devices with mocked inventory
steps.observed: Returns 'No routable GPUs detected.'

evidence.consoleErrors: PyTorch warning (expected - not installed for GPU), CyBERT inference connection refused (expected - no GPU server)
evidence.network: HuggingFace model HEAD requests (200 OK for tokenizer config)

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_plan with non-existent path
steps.observed: JSON with error.code=invalid_input, error.message='Path not found: ...', no Traceback

steps.observed: JSON with error.code=invalid_input, error.message='Path not found: ...'

steps.observed: JSON with error.code=invalid_input, error.message='Path not found: ...'

steps.action: Invoke tg_index_search with non-existent path
steps.observed: JSON with error.code=invalid_input, error.message='Path not found: ...'

steps.observed: JSON with error.code=invalid_input, error.message='Pattern must not be empty.'

steps.action: Invoke tg_index_search with empty pattern
steps.observed: JSON with error.code=invalid_input, error.message='Pattern must not be empty.'

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_plan with valid input after errors
steps.observed: Valid rewrite plan returned successfully

assertions.title: Unified JSON shapes used by M5 MCP tools

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_plan and validate v1 schema fields (version:int, routing_backend:str, routing_reason:str)
steps.expected: All v1 fields present with correct types
steps.observed: version=1 (int), routing_backend='AstBackend' (str), routing_reason='ast-native' (str) - all present

steps.action: Invoke tg_rewrite_diff and validate v1 schema fields
steps.expected: All v1 fields present with correct types
steps.observed: version=1 (int), routing_backend='AstBackend' (str), routing_reason='ast-native' (str) - all present

steps.action: Invoke tg_index_search and validate v1 schema fields
steps.expected: All v1 fields present with correct types
steps.observed: version=1 (int), routing_backend='TrigramIndex' (str), routing_reason='index-accelerated' (str) - all present

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All MCP tools (rewrite_plan, rewrite_apply, rewrite_diff, index_search) return valid v1 JSON with routing metadata. Existing tools (tg_search, tg_ast_search, tg_classify_logs, tg_devices) continue working. Structured error handling confirmed for invalid paths and empty patterns. Post-error recovery confirmed.
